chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 137 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.11.2025. Mr. Muneer Ahmed Channa, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto, Assistant A.G, Sindh. = A statement has been filed by counsel for the applicants alongwith certain documents, which is taken on record. He undertakes to provide the copy of same to learned A.A.G. For the reasons to be recorded this Civil Revision Application is dismissed with direction to the trial Court to proceed with three Suits namely F.C. Suit No.13/2023, F.C. Suit No.100/2022 and F.C. Suit No.84/2024 expeditiously and dispose of the same within nine months from the date of receipt of the order with reasons. JUDGE Tufail
